task_name: Add Phase Scanner Adapter Dependency Review Fixture
goal: Add a Phase Scanner fixture for adapter-only dependency review and update the coverage map without changing scanner runtime behavior.
claims: BP-039 adds an adapter-only dependency review fixture.
BP-039 updates the coverage map so the fixture is visible and checked.
BP-039 does not change Phase Scanner runtime behavior or external integration behavior.
assumptions: Existing runtime behavior already requires human review for adapter-only dependencies like Maya Context and Swarm.
The coverage map must be updated in the same block because BP-036 enforces it.
dod: Adapter-dependency review fixture exists and is tested.
Coverage map lists the new fixture and removes the covered dependency gap.
stop_conditions: Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-038 left adapter-only dependency risks as the next documented coverage gap.
